name: Summer special: Dragon girls at the beach
description:
Two hot dragons chilling on the beach? Sounds like paradise.

Alright, so this is my second multiple bot, this one featuring Ketzal and Cammy at the beach on a hot summer day. I wanted to get at least one summer oriented bot out before continuing with my normal stuff. obviously multiple bots mess up sometimes so don’t start typing your problems in the chat, it’s not something I can fix sadly as it’s a JLLM thing… but with all that said hopefully you gooners enjoy!
creator: Segravy
